translated: So, with that said, I'd like to talk while we actually look at the card illustrations.
I'm on the monitor right now, on everyone's monitor.
The way her sister is smiling so happily at Mizuki in the New Year's event...
It really reminds me of Yuki-san giving the ribbon to a young Mizuki.
And Mizuki's expression here, showing it off like "How's this?", is just incredible.
I can't believe this is just the pre-training art.
You can see a torso in the background there.
With that said, let's look at the post-training art too.
Butterflies and ribbons have always been very symbolic for Mizuki.
In my mind, Mizuki usually has scissors in these illustrations.
But this time, there are no scissors, and it's such a bright space.
They're hiding their mouth, but you just know they're smiling. It's so precious.
My kid is such a good kid.
It's great to see Yuki-san here too.
Ena's reaction to meeting her sister for the first time and being overwhelmed by her energy...
If you haven't seen the event story yet, please check it out.
Seeing Yuki-san talk to all of Niigo is a must-see.
And this Ena... isn't it insane?
I think girls with their hair tucked behind their ears are great, and this illustration...
I thought she was a florist.
The way she's looking down slightly is also great.
He's eating the souvenirs from her sister. So cute.
Even if that were a protein bar, it would still be cute.
He's just eating the whole time.
I was like, "You're the only one who can pull off short pants like that!"
The overall vibe is a bit rare for Niigo, which is nice.
Is he holding a book about daisies?
Or my expertise on them is a bit shallow, so I'm not sure.
Sharing something delicious is so nice.
Everything tastes better when you share it.
It looks like an outfit Mizuki or Yuki-san would have picked out.
She looks good in it, obviously.
Setting aside where she'd actually wear it, I wonder if Kanade would really wear this headpiece...
When she goes out. I'm not really sure.
If it looks good on her, I think she should wear it.
She looks like a girl from a good family.
The ones on her chest and head.
In the side story, Kanade being made to try on all these different clothes is also super cute.
